sentences.en: I want to meet your family.
sentences.r: Wǒ xiǎng rènshi nǐ de jiārén.

sentences.en: I shower and get dressed.
sentences.r: Wǒ xǐzǎo ránhòu chuān yīfu.

sentences.en: My brother lives next door.
sentences.r: Wǒ gē zhù zài gébì.

sentences.en: It's a quarter to eight.
sentences.r: Xiànzài shì qī diǎn sān kè.

sentences.en: This one is actually worth the money.
sentences.r: Zhège zhēn de wù yǒu suǒ zhí.

sentences.en: I'm going to buy the ticket.
sentences.r: Wǒ qù mǎi piào.

sentences.en: Go straight until the square.
sentences.r: Yìzhí zǒu dào guǎngchǎng.

sentences.en: I looked for it everywhere.
sentences.r: Wǒ dàochù dōu zhǎo guò le.

sentences.en: I'm worried about my friend.
sentences.r: Wǒ dānxīn wǒ péngyou.

sentences.en: I'm almost never right.
sentences.r: Wǒ jīhū cónglái méi duì guò.

sentences.en: Why are you in such a hurry?
sentences.r: Nǐ jí shénme ya?

sentences.t: 你想出去，还是宁愿睡觉？
sentences.en: Do you want to go out or would you rather sleep?
sentences.r: Nǐ xiǎng chūqù, háishi nìngyuàn shuìjiào?

sentences.en: I don't know how to use this phone.
sentences.r: Wǒ bú huì yòng zhège shǒujī.

sentences.en: Do you eat at home or out?
sentences.r: Nǐ zài jiā chī háishi chūqù chī?

sentences.t: 我们星期五办了个派对。
sentences.en: We threw a party on Friday.
sentences.r: Wǒmen xīngqīwǔ bàn le ge pàiduì.

sentences.en: I'm going to pack my bag.
sentences.r: Wǒ qù shōushi bāo.

sentences.en: Don't ask me.
sentences.r: Bié wèn wǒ.

sentences.en: I asked where the bathroom was.
sentences.r: Wǒ wèn le wèishēngjiān zài nǎr.

sentences.t: 他问我我们什么时候见面。
sentences.en: He asked me when we're meeting up.
sentences.r: Tā wèn wǒ wǒmen shénme shíhou jiànmiàn.

sentences.en: She knows how to dance really well.
sentences.r: Tā wǔ tiào de tèbié hǎo.

sentences.en: Today is the eighth of March.
sentences.r: Jīntiān shì sānyuè bā hào.

sentences.en: I missed the bus again.
sentences.r: Wǒ yòu cuòguò gōngjiāo le.

sentences.en: Until what time do you work today?
sentences.r: Nǐ jīntiān gōngzuò dào jǐ diǎn?

sentences.en: He goes to bed really late.
sentences.r: Tā shuì de tèbié wǎn.

sentences.en: She eats and then works.
sentences.r: Tā xiān chīfàn zài gōngzuò.

sentences.en: We eat at home every day.
sentences.r: Wǒmen měitiān zài jiā chīfàn.

sentences.en: I wanted to try something new today.
sentences.r: Wǒ jīntiān xiǎng shì diǎn xīn dōngxi.

sentences.en: Take this pill and rest.
sentences.r: Chī le zhè piàn yào hǎohǎo xiūxi.

sentences.en: It's really hot in summer.
sentences.r: Xiàtiān tèbié rè.

sentences.en: Shall we meet tomorrow or Thursday?
sentences.r: Wǒmen míngtiān háishi zhōusì jiàn?

sentences.en: Do you have something for the pain?
sentences.r: Nǐ yǒu zhǐténg de ma?

sentences.en: I'm selling it for a hundred euros.
sentences.r: Wǒ mài yìbǎi ōuyuán.

sentences.en: Sometimes I want something sweet.
sentences.r: Yǒu shíhou wǒ xiǎng chī diǎn tián de.

sentences.en: Are you going to come see me?
sentences.r: Nǐ huì lái kàn wǒ ma?

sentences.en: When do you get back from your trip?
sentences.r: Nǐ lǚxíng shénme shíhou huílái?

sentences.en: I do the shopping on Saturdays.
sentences.r: Wǒ zhōuliù qù cǎigòu.

sentences.t: 跟我说说老板说什么了。
sentences.en: Tell me what the boss said.
sentences.r: Gēn wǒ shuōshuo lǎobǎn shuō shénme le.

sentences.t: 他没跟我说什么时候回来。
sentences.en: He didn't tell me when he was coming back.
sentences.r: Tā méi gēn wǒ shuō shénme shíhou huílái.

sentences.en: Why didn't you ask earlier?
sentences.r: Nǐ wèishénme bù zǎodiǎn wèn?

sentences.t: 跟我说说你刚才笑什么。
sentences.en: Tell me why you were laughing.
sentences.r: Gēn wǒ shuōshuo nǐ gāngcái xiào shénme.

sentences.en: My brother knows how to fix everything.
sentences.r: Wǒ gē shénme dōu huì xiū.

sentences.en: Marco knows how to speak many languages.
sentences.r: Marco huì shuō hǎoduō yǔyán.

sentences.en: I don't know that girl.
sentences.r: Wǒ bú rènshi nàge nǚhái.

sentences.en: Look carefully before you cross.
sentences.r: Guò mǎlù qián zǐxì kànkan.

sentences.en: I can't find my other shoe.
sentences.r: Wǒ lìng yì zhī xié zhǎo bu dào le.

sentences.en: I get up at seven.
sentences.r: Wǒ qī diǎn qǐchuáng.

sentences.en: I go to bed at eleven.
sentences.r: Wǒ shíyī diǎn shuìjiào.

sentences.en: What time do you get up?
sentences.r: Nǐ jǐ diǎn qǐchuáng?

sentences.en: How long have you been living here?
sentences.r: Nǐ zài zhèr zhù duōjiǔ le?

sentences.en: What time do you finish today?
sentences.r: Nǐ jīntiān jǐ diǎn jiéshù?

sentences.en: My birthday is in May.
sentences.r: Wǒ shēngrì zài wǔyuè.

sentences.t: 每个星期一我重新开始。
sentences.en: Every Monday I start again.
sentences.r: Měi ge xīngqīyī wǒ chóngxīn kāishǐ.

sentences.en: The water costs one euro.
sentences.r: Shuǐ yì ōuyuán.

sentences.en: How much did you pay for your phone?
sentences.r: Nǐ shǒujī mǎi le duōshao qián?

sentences.en: I spend a lot of money on coffee.
sentences.r: Wǒ zài kāfēi shàng huā hǎoduō qián.

sentences.en: My whole body hurts.
sentences.r: Wǒ húnshēn dōu téng.

sentences.en: Tomorrow I'll feel better.
sentences.r: Míngtiān wǒ huì hǎo diǎn.

sentences.t: 我每天早上学西班牙语。
sentences.en: I study Spanish every morning.
sentences.r: Wǒ měitiān zǎoshang xué Xībānyáyǔ.

sentences.en: It's three thirty.
sentences.r: Xiànzài sān diǎn bàn.

sentences.en: My dad is fifty years old.
sentences.r: Wǒ bà wǔshí suì.

sentences.en: We should go out more often.
sentences.r: Wǒmen yīnggāi duō chūqù zǒuzou.

sentences.en: Don't tell me the ending.
sentences.r: Bié gàosu wǒ jiéjú.

sentences.en: Should we each pay our own?
sentences.r: Wǒmen gè fù gè de ba?

sentences.en: I used to live with my parents.
sentences.r: Wǒ yǐqián gēn bàmā zhù.

sentences.t: 我想把这些旧东西卖了。
sentences.en: I want to sell these old things.
sentences.r: Wǒ xiǎng bǎ zhèxiē jiù dōngxi mài le.

sentences.en: That movie made me cry.
sentences.r: Nà bù diànyǐng kàn kū wǒ le.

sentences.en: I have a lot to do today.
sentences.r: Wǒ jīntiān yǒu hǎoduō shì yào zuò.

sentences.en: Tomorrow I have a lot to do.
sentences.r: Míngtiān wǒ yǒu hǎoduō shì yào zuò.

sentences.en: I only know that it's late.
sentences.r: Wǒ zhǐ zhīdào yǐjīng wǎn le.

sentences.en: Who says I can't?
sentences.r: Shéi shuō wǒ bùxíng?

sentences.en: I have everything I need.
sentences.r: Wǒ xūyào de dōu yǒu le.

sentences.en: She says she doesn't know.
sentences.r: Tā shuō tā bù zhīdào.

sentences.en: I can't right now, sorry.
sentences.r: Wǒ xiànzài bùxíng, bàoqiàn.

sentences.t: 我从不在工作前吃东西。
sentences.en: I never eat before working.
sentences.r: Wǒ cóng bù zài gōngzuò qián chī dōngxi.

sentences.en: I have to go to the doctor.
sentences.r: Wǒ děi qù kàn yīshēng.

sentences.en: I didn't go because I was tired.
sentences.r: Wǒ méi qù, yīnwèi wǒ tài lèi le.

sentences.en: No, I'm not ready yet.
sentences.r: Bù, wǒ hái méi zhǔnbèi hǎo.

sentences.en: I'm always late, I know.
sentences.r: Wǒ lǎoshi chídào, wǒ zhīdào.

sentences.en: I don't want anything else, thanks.
sentences.r: Wǒ bú yào bié de le, xièxie.

sentences.en: I'm good, thanks. And you?
sentences.r: Wǒ tǐng hǎo de, xièxie, nǐ ne?

sentences.t: 我很难过，因为我一个人。
sentences.en: I'm sad because I'm alone.
sentences.r: Wǒ hěn nánguò, yīnwèi wǒ yí ge rén.

sentences.en: I want the same thing as you.
sentences.r: Wǒ xiǎng yào gēn nǐ yíyàng de.

sentences.en: I don't know how to say no.
sentences.r: Wǒ bú huì jùjué biérén.

sentences.en: Excuse me, where's the bus?
sentences.r: Bù hǎoyìsi, gōngjiāo zài nǎr?

sentences.en: Sorry, I'm five minutes late.
sentences.r: Bàoqiàn, wǒ wǎn le wǔ fēnzhōng.

sentences.en: Her name is Ana, right?
sentences.r: Tā jiào Ānnà, duì ba?

sentences.en: I'm sleepy, I need a coffee.
sentences.r: Wǒ kùn le, děi lái bēi kāfēi.

sentences.en: I'm not sick, I'm just tired.
sentences.r: Wǒ méi bìng, jiùshì lèi le.

sentences.en: I need to rest a bit.
sentences.r: Wǒ děi xiūxi yíxià.

sentences.en: Tell me the truth, please.
sentences.r: Gēn wǒ shuō shíhuà, bàituō.

sentences.t: 我很开心，因为今天星期五。
sentences.en: I'm happy because it's Friday.
sentences.r: Wǒ hěn kāixīn, yīnwèi jīntiān xīngqīwǔ.

sentences.en: Because I always prefer tea.
sentences.r: Yīnwèi wǒ yìzhí gèng xǐhuan chá.

sentences.en: You can eat whatever you want.
sentences.r: Nǐ xiǎng chī shénme jiù chī shénme.

sentences.en: I think it's really good.
sentences.r: Wǒ juéde zhēn de hěn búcuò.
